hero.label: Apps Labs
hero.title: We build high-performance systems for e-commerce brands, SaaS founders, individuals, and companies that want to scale fast.
hero.description: Stop losing money to bad operations and generic websites. We build custom systems designed to generate revenue, automate operations, and grow your business—while you sleep.
hero.cta2: See what we'd build for you
hero.forEveryoneDesc: We partner with e-commerce brands, SaaS founders, individuals, and companies ready to scale.
hero.anythingWebDesc: Every system, SaaS, or AI tool we build is designed with one goal: massive ROI.
hero.builtToLaunchDesc: No endless delays. We focus on rapid execution and flawless usability.
hero.simpleProcessDesc: We design your system architecture before you even pay.
hero.flexibleClientsDesc: Best suited for serious projects starting at $2,000+. We do not do cheap templates.

services.label: Services
services.title: We build the money-making system you need.
services.description: If your business needs a system to make more money or save hundreds of hours, we build it. From high-end e-commerce to full SaaS platforms.
services.webAppsItems: Dashboards,SaaS products,Client portals,Booking and management systems

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: What we've built—and the money it made.
projects.description: We build money machines, not just portfolios. These are real systems we engineered to solve massive bottlenecks and generate cash.
projects.project1Desc: PROBLEM: Client was losing time on messy spreadsheets. SOLUTION: We built a custom sourcing dashboard. RESULT: Reduced manual work by 70% and eliminated missed orders.
projects.project2Type: Storage, packing, and delivery for online shops
projects.project2Desc: PROBLEM: Order fulfillment was too slow and untrackable. SOLUTION: We built an end-to-end storage and delivery system. RESULT: Automated workflows, saving logistics clients 40+ hours/month.
projects.project3Type: Product pages and checkout for people who sell online
projects.project3Desc: PROBLEM: Low conversion rates with generic store pages. SOLUTION: We built lightning-fast, highly-optimized product pages. RESULT: Increased conversions, handling 200+ orders/day with zero lag.

testimonials.label: Results
testimonials.title: Trusted by e-commerce brands, founders, and growing companies.
testimonials.description: We don't just build software. We build systems that solve real bottlenecks.
testimonials.t1quote: We needed a complex AI engine capable of turning a single product photo into high-converting landing pages in under 90 seconds. Apps Labs engineered a flawless, scalable SaaS platform that handles thousands of generations daily with zero downtime.
testimonials.t2quote: Logistics software in Africa has always been clunky and frustrating. Apps Labs stepped in and built us a lightning-fast, custom dashboard that finally connects our merchants, ground team, and admins together seamlessly. It just works.

process.label: Process
process.title: We design your system before you pay.
process.description: We keep the process simple and transparent. The goal is to move from idea to launch without confusion.
process.step1Desc: Share your bottleneck or idea. We'll jump on a free 30-minute call to map out your system.
process.step2Desc: We define what should be built, how it works, and what it will cost.
process.step3Desc: We design and develop the project with a clean, modern, usable result.
process.step4Desc: After launch, we can continue with maintenance, fixes, and new features.

whyUs.label: Why choose us
whyUs.title: We don’t do templates. We don’t do slow. We build fast, clean, and scalable.
whyUs.description: We build serious systems for people who want to scale. Some clients need a high-converting website, others need an AI workflow. We build the right solution to grow your business.
whyUs.point1Desc: We explain things clearly so non-technical clients can still feel comfortable and confident.
whyUs.point2Desc: We are not locked into one niche. We can build websites, tools, apps, SaaS products, and AI projects.
whyUs.point3Desc: Projects should look polished and feel professional, not outdated or confusing.
whyUs.point4Desc: If you need updates, fixes, or new features later, we can keep working with you.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Quick answers before you contact us.
faq.a1: Our custom systems start at $2,000+. We do not do cheap, generic templates. We build serious systems that generate ROI, aimed at companies ready to scale.
faq.a2: We partner with e-commerce brands, SaaS founders, individuals, and companies running into operational bottlenecks. If you are serious about your business, we can help.
faq.a3: Yes. We build AI automations that actually save you time and make you money—not just buzzword gimmicks.
faq.a4: Send us your project details. We will review them and jump on a free 30-minute call to discuss the exact system, timeline, and final pricing before you pay anything.
faq.q5: Do you support the project after launch?
faq.a5: Absolutely. We are your technical partners. We scale, update, and maintain the system as your business grows.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Book your free 30-min strategy call.
contact.description: We only take 3–5 projects per month to ensure quality execution. Send us your project details, and we'll jump on a 30-minute call to discuss your exact needs and finalize pricing.
contact.clientTypeValue: E-commerce brands, SaaS founders, individuals, businesses ready to scale.
contact.projectTypeValue: High-performance systems, SaaS, AI, and complex automation.
contact.formMessage: Tell us what you want to build or fix
contact.formHint: Keep it simple. Share your bottleneck and we will map out the solution.
contact.formSuccess: We have received your details. You will get an email soon about the details and we will contact you shortly before the meet to remind you.
contact.modalTitle: Select a time for your call
contact.modalSubtitle: Choose a 30-minute slot that works for you.

footer.description: We build high-performance systems for e-commerce brands, SaaS founders, individuals, and companies that want to scale fast.
